dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6188 IH: To amend title 36, United States Code, to designate the composition known as “Here Rests in Honored Glory” by Donald B. Miller as the national hymn of the United States.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Foxx introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 36, United States Code, to designate the composition known as Here Rests in Honored Glory by Donald B. Miller as the national hymn of the United States.

subsection.text: Chapter 3 of title 36, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

section.text: The composition consisting of the words and music known as Here Rests in Honored Glory by Donald B. Miller is designated as the national hymn of the United States.

subsection.text: The table of sections for chapter 3 of title 36, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:
